data.title: Bitdeer Reports Zero Net Bitcoin Holdings After Recent Sales
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer has disclosed its latest Bitcoin holdings on the X platform. According to Odaily, for the week ending May 29, Bitdeer mined a total of 206.2 BTC and sold the same amount, resulting in a net addition of zero BTC to its holdings. The data indicates that Bitdeer continues to maintain a zero Bitcoin holding status.

data.title: White House Memo Reports U.S. President Trump in Excellent Health
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump is reported to be in excellent health, according to a White House memo. The document indicates that his heart, lungs, nervous system, and overall physical condition are strong, according to Odaily.

data.title: MYX Finance to Unlock 18.06 Million Tokens on June 6
data.description: MYX Finance is set to unlock approximately 18.06 million tokens on June 6 at 0:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is valued at around $3.72 million. The data comes from Web3 asset data platform RootData, which tracks token unlock schedules.

data.title: Andreessen Horowitz Acquires $14.5 Million in HYPE Tokens
data.description: An address associated with Andreessen Horowitz has acquired 226,121 HYPE tokens, valued at $14.5 million, according to NS3.AI. This purchase highlights the firm's continued interest in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: HYPE Token Reaches New All-Time High as a16z-Linked Entity Continues Accumulation
data.description: The HYPE token has reached a new all-time high, with an entity linked to a16z continuing its accumulation, analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X. Over the past 12 hours, 174,917.41 HYPE tokens, valued at $11.116 million, were withdrawn from exchanges. Since 2026, the entity has accumulated a total of 5.9 million HYPE tokens, excluding those transferred to exchanges, with a total value of $251 million. The average withdrawal price was $42.56, resulting in an unrealized profit of $134 million.

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs See $1.3167 Million Net Inflow in One Day
data.description: According to NS3.AI, SoSoValue data revealed that U.S. Solana (SOL) spot ETFs experienced a net inflow of $1.3167 million in a single day. The Fidelity Solana Fund ETF was the leading contributor, accounting for $1.2059 million of the total net inflow.

data.title: Sui Mainnet Resumes Operations After Temporary Halt
data.description:
Sui's mainnet has resumed normal operations following a temporary halt, according to Foresight News. The interruption occurred during the deployment of a long-term fix, which triggered a pause at the end of a cycle. The issue arose because the initialization of random numbers at the start of each cycle could not be completed due to a quorum threshold higher than the Sui consensus, following the restart of validator nodes to deploy new binary files.

A potential flaw in the mechanism for saving the fault state prevented the network from transitioning to the next cycle. Validators have implemented a fix addressing both the underlying error and the affected period, allowing network activity to resume. A more detailed investigation report on the incident will be released subsequently.

data.title: Strategy Receives Identical Bitcoin Amount from CEX
data.description: On May 30, Strategy received 411 BTC from a centralized exchange (CEX), matching the amount deposited the previous day. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this transaction did not affect the probability of Strategy selling BTC by the end of the year, which remains at 89% on Polymarket.

data.title: Whale Address Linked to a16z Increases HYPE Holdings
data.description: A whale address, believed to be associated with a16z, has reportedly increased its holdings of HYPE. According to ChainCatcher, on-chain data reveals that since mid-April, the total purchase amount has approached $200 million.

data.title: Polymarket Sees $260M in Trades on Champions League Predictions
data.description:
According to Odaily, a Polymarket account with over $3.8 million in profits has invested $284,000 on Arsenal defeating Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) in the Champions League prediction market. The opening price was 42¢. Currently, the total trading volume for this prediction event is nearly $260 million, with PSG having a 57% chance of winning and Arsenal at 44%.

The 2025-2026 UEFA Champions League final is scheduled for May 31 at midnight (UTC+8) at the Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary. The match will feature defending champions PSG against Arsenal, who are returning to the final after 20 years. In their previous five Champions League encounters, PSG has a slight edge with two wins, two draws, and one loss.

data.title: Bipartisan Crypto Tax Legislation Introduced by U.S. Representatives
data.description: U.S. Representatives Steven Horsford, Max Miller, Suzan DelBene, and Mike Carey have introduced a bipartisan piece of legislation known as the PARITY Act, aimed at addressing cryptocurrency taxation. According to NS3.AI, Horsford and Miller expressed optimism about the ongoing negotiations, indicating that the legislation could be passed by the end of this year.

data.title: Philippine Central Bank Projects May Inflation Rate
data.description: The Philippine Central Bank has projected that the country's inflation rate for May could range between 7.1% and 7.9%. According to Jin10, this forecast reflects ongoing economic conditions and potential market fluctuations. The central bank continues to monitor inflationary trends closely to adjust monetary policies as needed.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Bitcoin as a Superior Capital Preservation Tool
data.description: Strategy founder Michael Saylor has expressed his view that Bitcoin offers a more robust form of capital preservation compared to traditional assets. According to NS3.AI, Saylor advised that individuals requiring liquidity should prioritize selling assets with shorter 'half-lives' before considering the sale of Bitcoin.

data.title: Dragonfly Transfers Significant SKY Holdings to CEX
data.description:
A significant transfer of SKY tokens has been detected, involving a suspected Dragonfly address. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the address moved 137 million SKY tokens to a centralized exchange (CEX), valued at $9.05 million.

The SKY holdings were originally withdrawn from a CEX in August 2021, when they were valued at $20.45 million. This movement marks a notable shift in the handling of these assets.

data.title: French Authorities Uncover Transnational Money Laundering Network in Crypto Kidnapping Case
data.description:
A 2023 cryptocurrency-related kidnapping case has seen significant developments, according to Foresight News. French law enforcement has uncovered a transnational money laundering network involving multiple countries and crypto wallets while investigating a €1.7 million ransom payment. The victim in this case was the father of "TeufeurS," a well-known crypto gambling influencer. The kidnappers threatened the victim's family via text messages, demanding the ransom in cryptocurrency. Ultimately, TeufeurS transferred a total of €1.7 million to the kidnappers' specified wallets in two transactions, leading to his father's release.

The investigation revealed that part of the ransom was transferred through multiple layers before ending up in wallet accounts controlled by foreign nationals. French gendarmes successfully traced $131,000 of the funds, which led to a crypto wallet controlled by a Venezuelan national. The case further exposed the complex chain of cross-border crypto asset transfers, anonymous wallets, and overseas platforms used by criminal organizations for money laundering.

This case is considered a significant example of kidnapping and extortion in the European crypto industry and may serve as an early model for several similar cases targeting cryptocurrency professionals in France and Europe by 2025.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 650 USDT with a 2.04% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 30, 2026, 01:55 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 650 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 650.340027 USDT, with a narrowed 2.04% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: CertiK and Forcerta to Host Digital Asset Security Workshop in Istanbul
data.description: CertiK, a leading Web3 security services provider, will host an exclusive workshop in partnership with Istanbul-based risk management firm Forcerta on June 5, 2026. The event, titled 'The Institutional Stakes: Security and Compliance in Digital Assets,' will take place at the Hilton Istanbul and will focus on security and compliance in digital asset adoption. According to BeInCrypto, the workshop will feature sessions on Turkey's CASP regulatory framework, Web3 threats, and digital asset custody. Key speakers include CertiK's Jason Jiang and Peiyu Wang.

data.title: HYPE, NEAR, and ETH Highlight This Week's Crypto Market
data.description: HYPE, NEAR, and ETH have emerged as key focal points in the cryptocurrency market this week. According to PANews, following the rise of Leopold, a new influential figure in the AI sector, Serenity, has gained attention. Additionally, the combined market value of major storage companies Micron, Samsung, and SK Hynix has surpassed $1 trillion. Meanwhile, stocks related to the anticipated SpaceX IPO have seen early gains.

data.title: PARITY Act Could Shape Future of U.S. Crypto Legislation
data.description:
The U.S. Digital Asset Protection, Accountability, Regulation, Innovation, Taxation, and Yield Act (PARITY Act) may become a significant piece of legislation in the crypto sector. According to Foresight News, U.S. Representative Jason Smith, Chairman of the House Ways and Means Committee, emphasized that bipartisan support is essential for advancing digital asset tax legislation. The PARITY Act aims to update tax rules for digital assets, providing a clearer regulatory framework while enhancing investor protection and preventing market manipulation.

Currently, the PARITY Act and the CLARITY Act are considered crucial components in establishing a comprehensive regulatory system for crypto assets in the United States. Earlier this year, Congress released a tax policy discussion draft in March and held a bipartisan roundtable in May to discuss the crypto asset tax structure. The market is closely watching whether the CLARITY Act will be passed by 2026. Analysts believe that if both the CLARITY and PARITY Acts are enacted, along with subsequent rules from the GENIUS Act, the U.S. crypto industry will experience a clearer regulatory environment, further integrating Web3 and DeFi into the mainstream financial system.

data.title: Hyperliquid's Largest Micron Technology Long Position Closes with $8.19M Profit
data.description: A major long position in Micron Technology (MU) on Hyperliquid has been closed, according to Foresight News. The position, valued at $21 million, was entered at $575 and closed at $956, resulting in a profit of approximately $8.19 million.
